notes: All port data sourced from Crestron's official 4-Series Control Systems Manual. The CP4-R is a 1U rack-mount residential/MDU control processor. Euroblock (3.5mm detachable terminal block) is the closest match for all the screw-terminal control ports (relay, IR/serial, COM, I/O, Cresnet). The SD card slot is not included as it does not have a connector type in the allowed list and is a storage accessory slot rather than a signal port. COM1 supports RS-232/422/485; COM2-3 support RS-232 only. The device ships with an external 24VDC power pack.

ports.name: COM 1
ports.note: 5-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; RS-232/422/485; 115.2k baud max

ports.name: COM 2
ports.note: 3-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; RS-232 only; 115.2k baud max

ports.name: COM 3
ports.note: 3-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; RS-232 only; 115.2k baud max

ports.name: IR/Serial 1-4
ports.note: 8-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block (shared with IR/Serial 5-8); IR up to 1.2 MHz or TTL/RS-232 serial output; 4 ports per block

ports.name: IR/Serial 5-8
ports.note: 8-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; IR up to 1.2 MHz or TTL/RS-232 serial output; 4 ports per block

ports.name: Relay 1-4
ports.note: 8-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block (shared with Relay 5-8); 8 normally open isolated relays, 1A 30VAC/VDC

ports.name: Relay 5-8
ports.note: 8-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; 8 normally open isolated relays, 1A 30VAC/VDC

ports.name: I/O 1-8
ports.note: 9-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; Versiport digital I/O (0-24VDC) or analog input (0-10VDC)

ports.name: NET (Cresnet)
ports.note: 4-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; Cresnet network for compatible Crestron devices

ports.name: USB (Rear)
ports.note: USB 2.0 Type-A female; rear panel; for mass storage devices

ports.name: USB (Front)
ports.note: USB 2.0 Type-B female; front panel; console/setup port

ports.name: Power
ports.note: 2.1x5.5mm DC barrel connector; 24VDC 2.0A input; external power pack included
